concepts.name: Linear Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation where variables are only raised to the power of one.

concepts.name: System of Equations
concepts.short_definition: A collection of two or more linear equations.

concepts.name: Solution Set
concepts.short_definition: The set of all values that satisfy all equations in a system.

concepts.name: Consistent System
concepts.short_definition: A system of equations with at least one solution.

concepts.name: Inconsistent System
concepts.short_definition: A system of equations with no solution.

concepts.name: Unique Solution
concepts.short_definition: A consistent system with exactly one solution.

concepts.name: Infinite Solutions
concepts.short_definition: A consistent system with an unlimited number of solutions.

concepts.name: Augmented Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix representing the coefficients and constants of a system of equations.

concepts.name: Coefficient Matrix
concepts.short_definition: The matrix formed by the coefficients of the variables in a system of equations.

concepts.name: Row Echelon Form
concepts.short_definition: A form of a matrix where leading entries are to the right of entries in rows above.

concepts.name: Reduced Row Echelon Form
concepts.short_definition: A form of a matrix where leading entries are 1 and all other entries in their column are 0.

concepts.name: Gaussian Elimination
concepts.short_definition: A method to solve systems of equations by transforming the augmented matrix to row echelon form.

concepts.name: Gauss-Jordan Elimination
concepts.short_definition: A method to solve systems of equations by transforming the augmented matrix to reduced row echelon form.

concepts.name: Elementary Row Operations
concepts.short_definition: Operations that can be performed on the rows of a matrix without changing the solution set.

concepts.name: Pivot
concepts.short_definition: The first non-zero entry in a row of a matrix in echelon form.

concepts.name: Pivot Position
concepts.short_definition: The position of a pivot in a matrix.

concepts.name: Pivot Variable
concepts.short_definition: A variable corresponding to a pivot column.

concepts.name: Free Variable
concepts.short_definition: A variable not corresponding to a pivot column.

concepts.name: Homogeneous System
concepts.short_definition: A system of linear equations where all constant terms are zero.

concepts.name: Trivial Solution
concepts.short_definition: The solution where all variables are zero, always a solution for homogeneous systems.

concepts.name: Non-trivial Solution
concepts.short_definition: A solution to a homogeneous system where at least one variable is non-zero.

concepts.name: Vector Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation expressed in terms of vectors.

concepts.name: Linear Combination
concepts.short_definition: A sum of vectors multiplied by scalars.

concepts.name: Span
concepts.short_definition: The set of all possible linear combinations of a set of vectors.

concepts.name: Column Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the column vectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Row Space
concepts.short_definition: The span of the row vectors of a matrix.

concepts.name: Null Space
concepts.short_definition: The set of all solutions to the homogeneous system Ax = 0.

concepts.name: Rank
concepts.short_definition: The dimension of the column space (or row space) of a matrix.

concepts.name: Dimension
concepts.short_definition: The number of vectors in a basis for a vector space.

concepts.name: Basis
concepts.short_definition: A linearly independent set of vectors that spans a vector space.

concepts.name: Linear Independence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where the only linear combination that equals the zero vector is the trivial one.

concepts.name: Linear Dependence
concepts.short_definition: A set of vectors where a non-trivial linear combination equals the zero vector.

concepts.name: Matrix-Vector Multiplication
concepts.short_definition: The operation of multiplying a matrix by a vector.

concepts.name: Determinant
concepts.short_definition: A scalar value that can be computed from a square matrix.

concepts.name: Cramer's Rule
concepts.short_definition: A method to solve systems of linear equations using determinants.

concepts.name: Inverse Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A matrix that, when multiplied by the original matrix, results in the identity matrix.

concepts.name: Identity Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with ones on the main diagonal and zeros elsewhere.

concepts.name: Singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a determinant of zero, meaning it has no inverse.

concepts.name: Non-singular Matrix
concepts.short_definition: A square matrix with a non-zero determinant, meaning it has an inverse.

concepts.name: Rank-Nullity Theorem
concepts.short_definition: A theorem relating the rank and nullity of a linear transformation.
